text.tspan: lunedì 13 luglio 2026 alle ore 00:51 Ora legale dell’Europa centrale

Phase F advanced operations (legal hold, retention, torrent, restore, select, Object Lambda, rename, encryption update, ABAC, object lock, session, metadata/table config) follow the established RouterFunction dispatch and service delegation pattern. Two persistence implementations exist: in-memory (reactive-infrastructure) and storage-engine profile (storage-engine).
